calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-06-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jami Deicke, Plaintiff
Javieree Pruit Hill and Luis Paredes, Defendants

This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Jami Deicke testifies on her own behalf.
Eric Lee testifieson behalf of the plaintiff.
The Court accepts Plaintiffs' group exhibits No. 1
Javieree Pruit Hill and Luis Paredes testify on their own behalf.
The Court accepts Defendant's exhibit A

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
The Court will return all exhibits upon ruling.
Judge Pro Tem E. Myles; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported (525)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
